decisions.title: Ship Sift Edge Sync-to-Sift Prototype as Alpha Feature
decisions.context: ENG-8855 prototype complete. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' pillar—enables edge deployment. Need to decide: alpha release to 2-3 customers or hold for more internal testing?

arguments.for: Early customer signal on edge-cloud sync patterns; accelerates 'Embed Deeper'; aligns with Q1 commitment to edge alpha
arguments.against: Sync reliability unknown at scale; could damage customer trust if data loss occurs; observability gaps (ENG-9002 still in progress)

decisions.title: Prioritize File Import Formats: TDMS vs HDF5 vs Parquet
decisions.context: Three parallel import efforts (ENG-8997 TDMS, ENG-8996 HDF5, ENG-8945 Parquet). Spreading eng thin. Which format drives most 'Decisions Captured'? Need customer data on usage patterns.
decisions.blockedBy: Missing: Customer survey on file format usage (% of data in each format). No north star tracking per format.

arguments.for: TDMS: National Instruments ecosystem large; HDF5: Scientific/aerospace standard; Parquet: Cloud-native, future-proof
arguments.against: Doing all three dilutes quality; none may move north star if customers already convert files manually

decisions.title: Consolidate Observability Work into Single Sprint
decisions.context: Four observability tickets scattered (ENG-8976 disk alerts, ENG-8961 vector metrics, ENG-8887 prometheus, ENG-9002 job observability). 'Build the Moat' requires reliability. Consolidate or continue parallel?

arguments.for: Single sprint creates coherent monitoring story; reduces context switching; easier to demo system health to customers
arguments.against: Each system (data-batcher, vector, jobs) has different owners; forcing sync may slow all three

decisions.title: Kill Window Functions in Query Engine
decisions.context: ENG-8990 removing window functions. Risky: breaks existing queries? Or dead code? Need evidence: how many customers use window functions in last 90 days.
decisions.blockedBy: No query usage telemetry. Cannot assess customer impact. Need ENG to add query pattern logging first.

arguments.for: Simplifies engine; window functions slow and rarely used (anecdotal); frees eng for sampling methods (ENG-8905)
arguments.against: If ANY customer uses them, removal is breaking change; no migration path documented; undermines 'Nail the Core' stability

decisions.title: Ship Calculated Channels Workflow (ENG-8798) in Explore V2 or Canvas?
decisions.context: New calc channel workflow ready. Decision: Bundle with Explore V2 launch (clean UX) or ship in Canvas first (faster feedback)? Affects 'Nail the Core' sequencing.

arguments.for: Explore V2: Coherent story, less tech debt. Canvas: Faster to market, real usage signal before V2 investment
arguments.against: Explore V2: Delays feedback by 4-6 weeks. Canvas: May require rebuild for V2, double work

timeAudit.weekSummary: 55% of week in meetings—above healthy threshold. 3 decision-making meetings missing: Edge alpha go/no-go, file format prioritization, observability consolidation. Recommend: Friday 2hr decision sprint with eng leads.
alerts: No decision forum scheduled for edge prototype (ENG-8855)—release or hold?
File import work (TDMS/HDF5/Parquet) spreading across 3 teams with no prioritization meeting
Query engine changes (remove window functions, add sampling) lack customer impact review
33 Linear tickets in signals—potential scope creep without quarterly planning review

events.title: DECISION: Kill Window Functions?
events.description: Query engine team must decide on ENG-8990. Blocked by lack of usage telemetry. Risk: breaking change if customers use feature.

events.title: DECISION: Consolidate Observability Sprint?
events.description: 4 parallel observability efforts (disk alerts, vector metrics, prometheus, job observability). Decide: consolidate or continue parallel.

events.title: DECISION: File Format Prioritization
events.description: Choose focus: TDMS, HDF5, or Parquet. Blocked by missing customer data on format usage. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' pillar.

events.title: GATE: Sift Edge Alpha Release
events.description: Go/no-go on ENG-8855 prototype to alpha. Risks: sync reliability, observability gaps. Opportunity: early customer signal for edge strategy.

events.title: DECISION: Calc Channels in Explore V2 or Canvas?
events.description: ENG-8798 ready. Decide placement: Bundle with Explore V2 (clean) or ship in Canvas (fast feedback). Affects 'Nail the Core' sequencing.

events.title: MILESTONE: Explore V2 Beta Expansion
events.description: Target: 10 customers in Explore V2 beta. Currently at 3. At risk. May need fast-follow features (calc channels, dynamic windows) to drive adoption.

events.title: Quarterly Strategy Review
events.description: Q1 strategy health check. Review north star (Decisions Captured), pillar progress (Nail/Embed/Build), reallocate resources for Q2.

events.title: MILESTONE: Observability Platform Complete
events.description: All services instrumented (disk, vector, jobs, query engine). Target: 95% coverage. Currently 67%. Consolidation decision (Mar 8) affects timeline.

events.title: GATE: Python Rules Production Readiness
events.description: Assess Python Rules for wider rollout. Need 3 prod customers by Q1 end (currently 1). Gate criteria: performance, security, customer satisfaction >8/10.
